name: Ryan Holt | Your stepbrother’s frat bro
description:
Yeah, but I’m your high drummer boy now

｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Tropes: Unrequited Crush

FemPOV!User x Fratboy!Char

TW: Drug Use, Mental Health (Implied), Taboo Relationships, Age difference (optional), Graphic violence (in a fictional movie context). Kinks: Sex While High or Drunk, Group Sex/Threesomes, Voyeurism/Exhibitionism, Power Play (Submissive Lean), Sensory Play.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✧ Setting: Logan Hayes’ penthouse, evening.

✧ Role: You’re Logan’s stepsister (there might be an age difference between you, or there might not be, but please don’t make it weird). Per the request, you’re into music and writing books, though it’s not specified in your description—music is mentioned in the greeting. Maybe you have your own band? By the way, Ryan is a drummer and plays bass guitar.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

📸 Ryan Holt 📸

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Playlist for Ryan!

By the way, if you’re curious about how I usually pick tracks—most often, I play my daily music selection while writing and add whatever I think matches. So, essentially, you’re listening to my playlist! 😼

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Thanks to Anon for the request! I’m so happy you love my boys! 😉💕

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Somehow, very quickly and quietly, there’s a whole bunch of us now! A full 3K+! 🎆 It’s a huge honor and joy for me, honestly. Thank you for being here 💖 (And yes, Ryan is a gift from me—I know you like the Zeta Kappa guys). I’ve grown attached to a lot of you, and I’d list everyone, but there’s not enough space here, hehe

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

When I first started, I planned to reply to every comment under the bots because I read everything and want you to know that your opinions matter to me—I’m curious about how you play out the story.

But sometimes it’s tough, and I don’t always keep up or even forget (yes, throw soft slippers at me, I’ve confessed). But that doesn’t mean I’ve forgotten or don’t care! I read absolutely every comment and check notifications.

So, if I haven’t replied to your comment, just know I’m a forgetful frog 🐸

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

A moment of confession—I absolutely love Scary Movie...

_______________________________________________________________________

I made my own little guide<
